AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AGAINST LOCAL 21 INTERNATIONAL. DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR NON- SUIT IS GRANTED. THE COURT RULES THAT MEETING DID TAKE PLACE.
